title: MLEB Setup and Runbook
description: Developer setup and execution guidance from the MLEB README.
coverage: Setup: We recommend setting up a virtual environment for this project and installing necessary dependencies using [uv](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/) like so: | git clone https://github.com/isaacus-dev/mleb.git | curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh | uv venv --python 3.12 | source .venv/bin/activate. Usage: To evaluate embedding models on MLEB, you can simply run the [scripts/mleb.py](./scripts/mleb.py) script, like so: | python scripts/mleb.py | Results are written in the [mteb](https://github.com/embeddings-benchmark/mteb) format to the [results](./results) directory.
license_notes: Repository documentation under MIT project context.
